scripts.docker:dev: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker-compose.yml up -d && npm run docker:migration:run
scripts.docker:reset: npm run docker:stop:volumes && npm run docker:build:no-cache && npm run docker:dev
scripts.docker:webApi: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker-compose.yml exec doshka_web_api sh
scripts.docker:webClient: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker-compose.yml exec doshka_web_client sh
scripts.docker:db: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker-compose.yml exec doshka_db psql -U $DATABASE_USERNAME -d $DATABASE_NAME
scripts.docker:migration:run: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker-compose.yml exec doshka_web_api npm run migration:run
scripts.docker:migration:generate: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker-compose.yml exec doshka_web_api npm run migration:generate
